title: Address sanitizer upset on bit-select operations over-reading memory

features.name: variable bit-select on large packed array in class method
features.description: Code should include a class task performing a variable bit-select operation on a packed array wider than 256 bits using the part-select syntax with a computed index
features.snippet: class C; task t(input bit [559:0] sig, input int i); bit [34:0] tmp = sig[35*i+:35]; endtask endclass
